nodes.context: Powerful clan of the 'Ndrangheta based in Castellace and Oppido Mamertina, Calabria. Involved in racketeering, kidnapping, extortion, and land acquisition.
Criminal and mafia-type organization in Calabria, southern Italy.
Clan closely linked to the Mammoliti clan through intermarriage, often referred to together as Mammoliti-Rugolo clan.
Clan involved in a bloody feud with the Mammoliti clan in the 1950s in Castellace. Eventually moved to Platì.
Powerful 'Ndrangheta family closely linked to the Mammoliti-Rugolo clan. Involved in land expropriations and the Getty kidnapping.
'Ndrangheta clan closely linked to the Mammoliti-Rugolo clan.

edges.context: Mammoliti 'ndrina is a clan of the 'Ndrangheta.
Closely linked through intermarriage, often referred to as Mammoliti-Rugolo clan.
Bloody feud in the 1950s; Mammoliti clan prevailed and Barbaro moved to Platì.
Closely linked; collaborated in land expropriations and the Getty kidnapping.
Closely linked to the Mammoliti-Rugolo clan.
